packageRules.description: self-reference; hash is unknown until after merge, and immutable releases make tag pinning safe

Pin to v1.0.145; v1.0.146 added `rm -rf` of `${RUNNER_TEMP}/claude-prompts` in agent mode (anthropics/claude-code-action#1288), which wipes the `claude-user-request.txt` we write beforehand and breaks `/kyosei` slash command processing. Re-enable once upstream provides a way to inject the user request, or we adopt a different invocation strategy.
